U,w in ipairs({{544289+-544288,1039262-1038971};{350284+-350283;377311+-377034},{4550+-4272,575138-574847}})do while w[2847-2846]<w[943990-943988]do local function U(U)return F[U+(-919671+951439)]end do local U=string.sub local w=string.char local K=type local p=math.floor local j=table.insert local e=table.concat local x=string.len local c=F local
